sys_script_include.description:
This Script is used for the initial release of Task Privacy After the initial release, some of this may move into other functions
2.8.x | 2023-05-01 - raj - DFCT0011800 - TAA > click > Organizational Hierarchy Tree Bi-Fold . ERROR DISPLAY (or any ATF users) 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139614 - Modify Task Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139615 - Modify Template Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139616 - Modify Template Assignment with a Open OU - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139617 - Modify Task Assignment with a Open - Selecting Users for users not dependent on Primary Assignee 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139618 - Modify Task Assignment with a Private - Selecting Primary Assignee Office 2.8.x | 2023-05-04 - raj - STRY0139619 - Modify Template Assignment with a Private OU - Selecting Primary Assignee
sys_script_include.name: task_privacy
